aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are likely to cite Air Solutions Heating & Cooling due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in schema markup and conversational content are needed to maximize visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight their FAQ content.
Expand on conversational content to align with AI query patterns.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: Missing HowTo schema for explaining HVAC solutions.
FAQPage schema could be more detailed.
No LocalBusiness schema enhancements for service area and offerings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of detailed conversational content tailored to AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Complex HVAC troubleshooting queries that require detailed explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding on existing FAQ content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts through detailed guides and use of HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from AI users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models prioritize detailed, schema-enhanced content for citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance schema markup, expand conversational content, and actively manage GBP to align with AI query patterns.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Enhance Your HVAC Authority Now
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found significant opportunities to boost your AI visibility.
cta: Let's discuss how to make your HVAC expertise stand out to AI assistants and capture more leads.
